title: Dogfood Pass 0014 Quantum Receipt Promotion Hardening

claims.text: Pass 0014 created a QuantumReceiptHardeningFixture/v1 artifact with status HARDENING_FIXTURE_MATCH and seal 5f68b4cb41349c3b0b8fd83a0ba35c6a9aef09283e61b55cb11a407172ecb8c4.
claims.falsification: schemas/quantum-receipt-hardening-fixtures-pass-0014.json is missing, is not QuantumReceiptHardeningFixture/v1, reports non-MATCH status, or lacks the expected seal

claims.text: Pass 0014 includes a negative promotion fixture that attempts EXACT_SIMULATOR to CLOUD_HARDWARE promotion and expects REJECT with branch, hardware-claim, cloud task metadata, calibration, and result-payload rejection reasons.
claims.falsification: the negative promotion fixture is missing, does not attempt EXACT_SIMULATOR to CLOUD_HARDWARE promotion, does not expect REJECT, or omits any required rejection reason

claims.text: Pass 0014 includes a HARDWARE_MOCK receipt with hardware_claim_allowed=false, cloud-task-shaped backend metadata, and verdict MOCK_MATCH_NOT_HARDWARE.
claims.falsification: the hardware mock receipt is missing, uses a branch other than HARDWARE_MOCK, allows hardware claims, lacks task-shaped metadata, or does not report MOCK_MATCH_NOT_HARDWARE

claims.text: Pass 0014 includes Qiskit/OpenQASM 3 and Cirq JSON shape adapter fixtures that normalize to two qubits, two gates, one two-qubit gate, and depth two with HTTPS source anchors.
claims.falsification: adapter fixtures are missing, omit either Qiskit/OpenQASM 3 or Cirq JSON shape, normalize to a different circuit shape, or lack HTTPS source anchors

claims.text: Pass 0014 includes a QuantumResourceEstimateReceipt/v1 with status ESTIMATE_ONLY_NOT_EXECUTION and execution_claim_allowed=false.
claims.falsification: the resource estimate receipt is missing, is not QuantumResourceEstimateReceipt/v1, reports an execution status, or allows an execution claim

claims.text: Pass 0014 binds phase-sensitive clone claims to statevector-or-density evidence plus fidelity, rejects histogram-only evidence for that claim, and requires provider/device, task id, shots, calibration, and payload hash for cloud hardware result claims.
claims.falsification: metric bindings are missing, phase-sensitive clone claim accepts histogram-only evidence, or cloud hardware result claim omits any required sufficient metric

claims.text: Pass 0014 records tool receipts showing Index, Gather, Telos, Forum, and Crucible status MATCH while preserving Forum submit as UNVERIFIABLE due to executor JSON parsing.
claims.falsification: schemas/tool-receipts-pass-0014.json is missing, lacks any required tool status, or treats Forum submit as successful rather than UNVERIFIABLE

claims.text: Pass 0014 promotes zero new quantum hardware results, quantum advantage claims, theorem proofs, natural laws, or scientific discoveries.
claims.falsification: any pass 0014 artifact labels a new quantum hardware result, quantum advantage claim, theorem proof, natural law, biological result, material result, medical result, finance result, or safety result as promoted
